task: Money-path double-stringify sweep (sibling of FIX-TASK-CREATE-DOUBLE-STRINGIFY). Same root cause: these api clients pre-stringified the body with JSON.stringify(...) while apiRequest (api/client.ts) already does the single JSON.stringify(options.body), so the body double-encoded to '"{...}"' and the server would 400 'expected object, received string'. Fix (frontend only, no migration): pass the RAW OBJECT to apiRequest in the money-path callers -- accounting reconciliation match/unmatch, classes bulk-update, auto-deduction policies create/patch, team-split config create, and the two factoring Faro import callers. Adds api/finance-double-stringify.test.ts asserting the reconciliation + bulk-classes request bodies are objects. Non-money sibling files (compliance, document-alerts, maintenance parts, usmca activation, safety anomaly) are left for a separate lower-priority sweep.
